title: hedyosmos incisus
intro: Hedyosmum incisum, also known as the Boxberry or Box Honeysuckle, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Santalaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Hedyosmum incisum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Hedyosmum incisum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
